classes.name: misbound_auth
classes.doctor_hint: Required envelope header missing or malformed. Verify the request reached the extension via Traefik (not a direct in-cluster call) and that the platform is healthy.

classes.name: unexpected_context
classes.doctor_hint: Envelope headers missing or wrong shape; check you are running in the expected context (local dev vs. cluster).

classes.name: out_of_envelope_access
classes.doctor_hint: Extension attempted cross-workroom or out-of-scope access. Verify the X-Workroom-Id and user permissions.

classes.name: platform_outage
classes.doctor_hint: Platform API unreachable or returning 5xx. Try `kz-ext doctor` and check platform status.

classes.name: stream_interrupted
classes.doctor_hint: Upstream streaming response failed after bytes were committed downstream. Most often a network drop mid-stream; check upstream connectivity and the platform's request-timeout settings. Pre-commit 401s would have surfaced as platform_outage; if you see stream_interrupted alongside repeated 401s, refresh-loop your auth path.
